description_long: This is a large, tracked military combat vehicle with a boxy, angular superstructure and a camouflage paint scheme. The vehicle features a set of multiple launch tubes or rocket pods mounted on the upper rear section, suggesting it is a multiple rocket launcher system. The hull is robust, with visible armor plating covering the entire body, and the tracks are wide and reinforced for off-road mobility. There are two prominent headlights at the front, and a long radio antenna extends from the top. The vehicle's exterior is finished in a green and brown woodland camouflage pattern, with no visible military markings or insignia.
description: A large, tracked military vehicle with a boxy superstructure, multiple rocket launchers, and woodland camouflage paint.
description_view_0: Front view shows the armored hull, two headlights, and the front of the rocket launcher array.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the tracks, the boxy launcher system, and the long antenna.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the back of the launcher pods and the armored rear hull.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the tracks, launcher system, and antenna from the other side.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large multiple rocket launcher pod mounted on the upper rear section of the vehicle.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with thick, angular panels covering the hull and superstructure.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage with irregular green and brown patches and black accents.
